description_long: This house features a simple, box-like structure with a weathered, dark brown exterior that suggests aged concrete or stone. The front facade displays a single door at the bottom right and two windows, one on each level, both of which are boarded up with wooden planks, indicating abandonment or disrepair. The lower portion of the front wall is detailed with a brick pattern, while the upper section is plain and rough. The sides and back of the house are unadorned, with a consistent, rough texture and no visible openings or architectural details. The flat roof is slightly overhanging and matches the dark, worn appearance of the rest of the building. Overall, the house exudes a utilitarian, neglected urban feel, suitable for post-apocalyptic or rundown city environments.
description: A weathered, boxy house with a flat roof, boarded windows, and a single door, featuring a rough, dark brown exterior and a brick-patterned lower facade.
description_view_0: The front view shows a door, two boarded windows (one on each level), and a brick-patterned lower wall.
description_view_1: The left side is plain, with a rough, dark brown surface and no windows or doors.
description_view_2: The back view is featureless, showing only the rough, dark brown wall surface.
description_view_3: The right side is also plain, matching the left with no openings or architectural features.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with no steps, porch, or decorative elements; utilitarian and unadorned.
